name: Paluuth
description:
👽🌊 |OC| |ANYPOV| |Modern Earth| 

A week ago your plane crashed leaving you stranded on a deserted Island. Good thing you're not alone! He's been alone for so long so congratulations on being his first friend(?)...

Tw: possible noncon?

Also 🥚's he has them 😏. Inspired by the movie 'Sweetheart' (2019) it's so good if you wanna watch a horror/sci-fi/thriller kinda thing.

Tested on gpt 4 and Claude only. Not sure how he'll act with JLLM or how well it does creatures! Hope you all like my silly alien boy. (Also incorporating a new format into my newer bots ☺️)
creator: AnitaFajita
